info.title: LiveChat Backend API
info.description: LiveChat + Helpdesk Inbox Backend API. Managed by Admin and Widget APIs.

get.description: Get a list of visitors currently online (active in the last 2 minutes).

post.summary: Log the user in and return a token

post.description:
Initialize a new widget session. Resolves the visitor identity, enforces identity policies,
and links to an existing or new conversation. Returns a session token.

enum: X-Channel-Key and X-Visitor-Uid headers are required.

get.description: Get a paginated list of canned replies visible to the user (own + shared).

post.description: Create a new canned reply. Can be personal or shared.

get.summary:
Get Embed Script (Web only)
Generates script dynamically

message.example: Embed script only available for web_chat

get.description: Get available channel types for inbox creation.
Get a paginated list of contacts.
Get details of a specific contact.
Get a paginated list of conversations for this contact.
Get a paginated list of notes for this contact.

post.description: Add a new internal note to the contact.
Merge this contact into another contact.

get.description: Get a paginated list of conversations with filters (status, assigned_to_me).
Get full details of a specific conversation including messages and participants.

post.description: Send an agent reply or internal note.
Add the current user as a participant.
Remove the current user from participants.
Transfer conversation to another user or department.

get.description: Get a paginated list of departments.

post.description: Creates an Inbox and its primary Channel in a single atomic operation.

get.description: Returns summary and daily breakdown of conversations and messages.
Get a paginated list of users (agents and admins).

post.description: Create a new user (agent or admin) and assign roles/departments.

put.description: Update user details, roles, and departments.

get.description:
Retrieve the widget configuration, including UI settings, identity policy, and realtime connection details.
Supports caching via ETag.

parameters.name: X-Channel-Key
parameters.description: The public channel key (Required if not in query)

get.description:
Retrieve a paginated list of messages for the active conversation.
Requires a valid session token.

post.description:
Send a new message from the visitor to the conversation.
Requires a valid session token.

Renew the session token using the Visitor UID. Does not require the old token.
Use this if the session expires (401).

409.description: Should not happen if bootstrap always creates anonymous contact, but safety check:

is_note.description: 'internal_note' => ['boolean'] ? Separate endpoint or flag? M3 plan says "Reply, Note".

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
